svg.title: Post-fill pipeline — account, position and notification updates
svg.desc: After OrderFilledEvent is published to Kafka, three independent consumers update account balance, currency position, and notify the client via WebSocket

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should OrderFilledEvent be structured — what fields, what Kafka partition key?')
sendPrompt('How does Account Service update balance after FX fill — debit, release reserved margin, update available?')
sendPrompt('How does Position Service track open FX position — long/short, average entry price, unrealized PnL?')
sendPrompt('How does Notification Service push fill confirmation to client — WebSocket event schema?')
sendPrompt('How to handle concurrent balance updates safely — optimistic locking, versioning?')
sendPrompt('How to calculate realized PnL when a position is closed in FX?')
sendPrompt('What does the client UI receive after order fill — balance, position, fill details?')
sendPrompt('How to update order status to FILLED idempotently — what if the consumer retries?')
g.text: trade record persisted · audit log written
